description: Operational MCP tools for selected Autumn customer, plan, and billing API routes.
name: @autumn/mcp

secret_key.title: secretKey
secret_key.description: The secretKey to use for the request

x_api_version.title: xApiVersion
x_api_version.description: The xApiVersion to use for the request

fail_open.title: failOpen
fail_open.description: The failOpen to use for the request

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Get one Autumn customer by customer ID, with optional expanded fields.

tools.name: list_customers
tools.description: List Autumn customers. Use the search field to find customers by ID, name, or email.

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Get one Autumn plan by plan ID and optional version.

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List Autumn plans. Optionally pass a customer ID to include customer eligibility.

tools.name: attach
tools.description: Attach a plan to a customer. This may create or update subscriptions, invoices, or payment links.

tools.name: preview_attach
tools.description: Preview the billing impact of attaching a plan to a customer. This does not execute the attach.

tools.name: update_subscription
tools.description: Update a customer subscription. This may change quantities, cancel, uncancel, invoice, or update billing state.

tools.name: preview_update_subscription
tools.description: Preview the billing impact of updating a customer subscription. This does not execute the update.
